title: 7 Real Estate Stocks to Sell Pronto Before a Painful Downturn

title: Pro: D R Horton is a ‘buy' despite the U.S. housing recession
text: U.S. housing market has seen a lot of pain this year as mortgage rates went up rapidly. But that has also created some exciting opportunities for the equity investors, says Art Hogan – the Chief Market Strategist at B.

title: D.R. Horton: Our Favorite Deep Value Pick Among Homebuilders
text: D.R. Horton, Inc. is our favorite deep-value pick for a medium-to-long-term investment horizon. For more diversification, investors may consider adding homebuilder ETFs. Besides favorable international migration trends that could boost U.S demographics as a whole, domestic/interstate migration trends further suggest that Sun Belt states will benefit disproportionately from greater demand for housing.

title: 3 Outperforming Homebuilders to Consider as Sentiment Declines
text: With mortgage rates rising on the back of climbing interest rates, homebuilder sentiment in the single-family home market has tumbled to half of what it was six months ago.
